title: Zigzag Conversion
output_format: The parsed string after converting to zigzag pattern.
constraints:
- `1 <= s.length <= 1000`
- `s` consists of English letters (lower-case and upper-case), `','` and `'.'$.
- `1 <= numRows <= 1000`
function_signature: function convert(s: string, numRows: number): string {}
